channel.title: Bbl on MacReiben Web Zone
channel.description: Recent content in Bbl on MacReiben Web Zone

item.title: Domain Driven Design BBL at Qualcommlife Paris
item.description: I’ve done a BBL version of my DDD introduction talk in Qualcomm Life Paris. This one was very challenging because I had to compress a two hour talk in one hour. I looking forward to present it again. The slides are here. Next event, DDDEurope 2019 Amsterdam, as a visitor :).
